reasoning: Bad Bunny released a major new album, "Debí Tirar Más Fotos," on January 5, 2025, which gives him a full year of tracking and an initial spike (hitting #1 on daily charts in late January). However, Taylor Swift's dominance is extremely high; she was the #1 artist in 2023 and 2024, with her 2024 streams reaching a massive 26.6 billion. To reclaim #1, Bad Bunny would likely need to exceed 20-25 billion streams, a feat he hasn't achieved since his 2022 peak (which was around 18.5 billion). Reports from mid-2025 indicate that artists like Bruno Mars and The Weeknd are also seeing immense activity, with Bruno Mars reportedly leading in streams for several months early in the year. Given Swift's massive catalog strength and the momentum of her 2024 release "The Tortured Poets Department" carrying into 2025, it is unlikely Bad Bunny will overcome the massive gap to reach #1 globally for the full calendar year.
